Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: S1E2 Tour
programme.desc: Pursuing the Tour de France, one of the most physically demanding sporting events in the world, covers over 3,535 kilometers in just three weeks. Every young cyclist dreams of competing in this prestigious race, but only nine riders from each team make the cut. Young cyclist Adam Yates is giving everything he has to prove he belongs on cycling’s biggest stage. 2016 Tour de France winner Chris Froome reflects on the long and grueling journey to victory, while former professional cyclists and Tour de France veterans Jens Voigt, Christian Vande Velde, and Haimar Zubeldia reveal what it truly takes to compete at the highest level.

programme.title: Hogslayer
programme.desc: The award-winning true-life story of the dual-engine Norton motorcycle dragster designed, built, and raced by TC Christenson and John Gregory of Sunset Motors. The documentary chronicles the Sunset Motors Racing Team’s unrivaled innovation and unbridled courage as they faced unyielding challengers throughout the United States and Europe in the 1970’s. TC and John are featured as they relate their experiences of those years rising from local street racers to the top race team in the world. This is bench-racing at its best directly from the original Sunset Motors in Kenosha, Wisconsin, home of the Hogslayer.

programme.title: The Motocross Files
programme.desc: Ron “The Dogger” Lechien is one of the handful of riders known to be the most naturally gifted motocross riders in history. This talent and stardom at a young age was a bad combination for Ron, over-shadowing his great races and 1985 National Championship with off-track challenges.

programme.title: Can-Am Takes on Hammertown and The Mud Nationals
programme.desc: Brace yourself for an exclusive look inside the brutal heart of King of the Hammers, where only the toughest machines and fiercest drivers survive. And a look at the Mud Nationals, it’s a full-blown mud-fueled party with the Can-Am crew at the center of the storm.

programme.desc: After a Native American man and his wife are ostracized by their tribes and attempt to build a life as farmers on the Ponderosa, a bigoted neighbor’s violent act of revenge triggers a dangerous cycle of vengeance that tests Ben Cartwright’s faith

programme.title: The Wagon Train S2E16 The Hunter Malloy Story
programme.desc: After Hunter Malloy kills a man in self-defense, he flees to the wagon train to escape a vengeful sheriff. As the lawman closes in, Malloy must decide whether to continue running or stand his ground and face the consequences of his actions.

programme.title: The Dude Ranger 1934,
programme.desc: A wealthy Easterner inherits a Western ranch and goes undercover as a cowboy to investigate a corrupt foreman who is plotting to seize the property for himself

programme.title: The Lone Ranger S1E8 -The Renegades,
programme.desc: When a crooked Indian agent and a gang of army deserters frame local tribesmen for supply train raids to provoke an unjust war, the Lone Ranger and Tonto work to expose the conspiracy and save Chief Swift Eagle from execution

programme.title: Idaho
programme.desc: A deputy sets out to prove that a respected judge, who had once been a criminal, is being framed for crimes committed by a crooked saloon owner.

programme.title: Wolves of the Range
programme.desc: Dorn is after the rancher's land and is trying to stop Banker Brady from helping them. When his man Hammond kills Brady, there is a run on the bank and Rocky volunteers to ride to the next town for money.

programme.title: They Call Him Cemetery 1971
programme.desc: In They Call Him Cemetery, two young brothers new to the frontier find themselves targeted by ruthless gunslingers and corrupt land barons. Just when all hope seems lost, a mysterious drifter known only as Cemetery (Gianni Garko) rides in. With nerves of steel and lightning-fast guns, he becomes their unlikely protector in a land where survival depends on the speed of your draw. Gritty, stylish, and action-packed, this Spaghetti Western delivers vengeance, justice, and the legend of a man called Cemetery.

programme.title: Minnesota Clay 1964
programme.desc: In Minnesota Clay, Cameron Mitchell stars as a gunfighter with fading eyesight, fighting to clear his name before blindness claims him. Wrongly imprisoned and hunted by both lawmen and outlaws, Clay must rely on skill, cunning, and sheer will to survive. With tense showdowns, stark desert landscapes, and the grit of early Spaghetti Western style, this is the tale of a man racing against time—and his own failing vision—for justice.

programme.title: The Fighting Renegade
programme.desc: A government agent falsely accused of murdering a professor takes the identity of "The Puma", a Mexican vigilante leader, to hide his real identity and find the actual killers.
